steps.action: On /onboarding step 1, click Continue with no role selected
steps.expected: Progress is blocked and an inline role error is shown
steps.observed: Stayed on step 1 and showed 'Please select a role to continue'

steps.action: Select Product Manager, advance to step 2, then click Continue with no company name or team size
steps.expected: Progress is blocked and both required field errors are shown
steps.observed: Stayed on step 2 and showed 'Company name is required' plus 'Please select a team size'

steps.action: Fill company name and team size, advance to step 3, then click Finish onboarding with no goals selected
steps.expected: Submission is blocked and a goal selection error is shown
steps.observed: Stayed on step 3 and showed 'Please select at least one goal'

evidence.network: GET /api/onboarding/status -> 200 observed during onboarding load; validation failures did not navigate away or submit onboarding.

steps.action: Click Create project with an empty Project name field
steps.expected: Form stays put, shows inline validation, and does not submit
steps.observed: Stayed on /dashboard/projects/new, showed 'Project name is required', and browser request log still showed no /api/projects requests

evidence.network: No /api/projects requests were captured before or after the empty-name submit attempt.

steps.action: Open / from a fresh browser session and navigate to Sign Up
steps.expected: Landing page and sign-up page render cleanly
steps.observed: Landing page and /sign-up both rendered with no stuck loading state

steps.expected: Account is created and first-time user is redirected into onboarding
steps.observed: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email was observed in the browser request log and the browser landed on /onboarding with an authenticated session

steps.expected: Successful onboarding redirects to project creation

steps.action: Create a project from the first-visit flow
steps.expected: Project is created and the app navigates to the project detail page
steps.observed: Project creation redirected to /dashboard/projects/2, and the detail page loaded with the new project title and stats

evidence.network: Browser network log showed POST /api/auth/sign-up/email during sign-up. Supplemental in-page request logging on isolated suffix accounts captured POST /api/onboarding -> 200 with role/company/team/goals payload and POST /api/projects -> 201 with project name/description payload.

steps.action: With an authenticated but incomplete user, open /dashboard

steps.expected: Completed user is redirected to /dashboard without looping
steps.observed: Opening /onboarding redirected to /dashboard and remained there after an additional wait

evidence.network: GET /api/onboarding/status -> 200 observed during both redirect directions; no redirect loop occurred.

frictions.description: agent-browser's network request listing duplicated some fetch entries and did not expose response status codes for the auth sign-up request.
frictions.resolution: Used additional isolated suffix accounts in the same browser session plus an in-page request logger to capture 200/201 statuses for onboarding and project creation; sign-up success was confirmed by the observed /api/auth/sign-up/email request plus authenticated redirect to /onboarding.

frictions.description: The semantic button locator for '1-5' matched both '1-5' and '21-50' on the team-size step.
frictions.resolution: Retried using an exact text click for '1-5'.

summary: Tested 4 assertions for onboarding/project first-visit flow: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The primary browser flow successfully went landing -> sign-up -> onboarding -> project create -> project detail, onboarding gating worked in both directions, and inline validation blocked incomplete onboarding and empty project-name submissions.
